pageDescription: Your professional skill inventory. The Resume Generator uses this to match you against job descriptions.
loadError: Failed to load skills. Please refresh the page.
footerStats: {count, plural, one {# skill} other {# skills}} · {categoryCount, plural, one {# category} other {# categories}}

emptyState.title: No skills yet
emptyState.description: Add your technical and soft skills. The more complete your profile, the more accurate the generated resumes.

dialog.similarNameWarning: Similar to existing skill “{name}”. Add anyway if this is different.
dialog.softSkillHint: Soft skills aren't rated by proficiency level.

detect.title: Detected skills
detect.description: Skills mentioned in your experiences, projects and stories that are not in your Skills Database yet. Review, adjust category and level, and add the ones that belong.
detect.empty: Nothing new found — every skill mentioned in your career data is already in your database.
detect.similarTo: Similar to existing "{name}" — might be a duplicate
detect.resultToast: {added, plural, one {# skill added} other {# skills added}}
detect.resultFailed: {failed, plural, one {# failed} other {# failed}} (possible duplicates)
